productDisplayName: Nautica Men White Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Multifunction analog watch with a steel round case and fixed bezelDial style: White dial with black and white handsStrap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: Two chronograph time displays, day display on the dial and water resistant to 100 M, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 year
